response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack and embedded software developer with a broad background in web, mobile, and GIS platforms, but has no demonstrated experience in any of the core competencies required for this role: SoC/IP modeling, AI/deep-learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, hardware-software co-design, or SIMD/MIMD architecture. While some low-latency systems work (DLang async I/O at Dunnhumby) and embedded/hardware-adjacent work (robotic arms at Altom) show systems-level awareness, these are far removed from the principal-level hardware performance engineering and AI accelerator expertise this position demands.
strengths: Long career (~14 years) exceeds the BS+8yr education threshold, demonstrating sustained technical growth
Low-latency and high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP req/s, async I/O, caching in DLang) indicates some performance engineering mindset
Breadth across embedded, systems, and infrastructure tooling shows adaptability beyond pure web work
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware performance analysis — the core job requirements
No background in AI/deep-learning workloads, neural network training/inference optimization, or AI accelerator design
Role is Principal/Senior IC in a highly specialized hardware domain; candidate's expertise is in web/full-stack software, a fundamentally different discipline

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP or hardware modeling experience
No AI/DL workload or accelerator expertise
Some low-latency systems and performance work
